description_long: This is a compact, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist, modern facade. The front features a combination of smooth light gray upper walls and a lower section clad in tan brickwork, separated by a horizontal trim. There are two rectangular windows with white frames, one larger on the upper floor and a smaller one on the lower floor, both asymmetrically placed. The main entryway is a simple, dark-colored door set into the brick section, with no visible porch or steps. The sides and rear of the house are plain, with the left and back sides finished in solid black and the right side in plain gray, lacking any windows or doors. The overall design is utilitarian, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, light gray walls, tan brick base, and asymmetrical windows on the front. The entryway is a simple door set into the brick section.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main door, two windows, and the contrasting brick and gray wall sections.
description_view_1: Left side view, entirely solid black with no windows or doors visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, also solid black and featureless, matching the left side.
description_view_3: Right side view, plain light gray with no windows or doors, matching the upper front wall.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple flush door with no porch, steps, or decorative elements
